_comment: Example 1 — Public consumer payments app. PCI + PII, customer-facing, aggressive RTO/RPO, multi-region. Exercises: HIGH categorization, multi-region recovery, PCI DSS + DORA + NIST CSF 2.0 coverage, public-facing edge architecture.

business.businessProblem: Lets consumers pay merchants and run payouts; replaces a third-party processor and reduces fees.
business.userInteractionDescription: Consumers initiate payments via web and mobile; merchants ingest via REST APIs; settlement runs server-to-server.

impact.confidentialityWorstCase: Disclosure of cardholder data triggers PCI fines, regulatory action, and class-action exposure.
impact.integrityWorstCase: Tampering with payment authorisation creates direct financial loss and breaks merchant trust.
impact.availabilityWorstCase: Outage halts merchant revenue and triggers SLA penalties.
